paragraphs: Implementation Analyst II at Zeta with a strong blend of technical expertise and client-facing experience across fintech, IoT, and enterprise integration environments. Specializes in partner onboarding, API/SDK integration, incident management, and technical support for banking modules — guiding financial institutions through seamless integrations and resolving complex configuration challenges.

Previously engineered smart parking deployments at GetMyParking, leveraging ANPR/LPR, microservices architecture, and cloud infrastructure. Background spans Python, Shell scripting, SQL, Docker, Linux, and monitoring tools including Grafana, OpenSearch, Kibana, and CloudWatch — bridging the gap between product, engineering, and customer success.

points: Lead end-to-end partner onboarding processes, guiding banks and financial institutions through integration of banking modules with platform standards compliance.
Provide hands-on technical guidance for REST API and SDK integrations; troubleshoot complex configuration and implementation issues.
Liaise cross-functionally with Engineering, QA, and Product teams to manage change requests and deliver customized solutions.
Oversee incident handling and coordinate across teams to ensure prompt resolutions and continuous operational stability.
Deployed smart parking solutions with ANPR/LPR, ensuring seamless integration with client infrastructure and optimizing system performance.
Utilized Python, shell scripting, Docker, and Linux for automation and system orchestration across microservices architecture.
Leveraged AWS services (SNS, S3, ECS, EC2, SES) for debugging and daily operational tasks.
Implemented real-time monitoring using Grafana, OpenSearch, CloudWatch, and Kibana; utilized Postman for API testing, validation, and automation.
Managed incident handling from root cause analysis to resolution; coordinated sprints via Jira.
Tested device compatibility and managed software-hardware connection processes for biometric products.
Resolved client issues related to software, collected requirements for hardware and software customizations.
Coordinated with QA and development teams; performed rigorous software and hardware testing post-development and deployed solutions in client environments.
Managed inventory flow using WMS and ERP systems, ensuring accurate tracking and efficient warehouse operations.
Gained hands-on exposure to corporate operations and daily workflows in one of India's largest retail chains.
Learned complaint resolution processes across Fresh, Digital, Footprints, and Jewellery verticals.
Followed and documented security guidelines including preventive maintenance, weekly deep cleaning, pest control, and thermographic testing.

education.institution: Gandhi Institute for Education and Technology (GIET), Khurda
Central Tool Room and Training Centre (CTTC)
